g.text: m10: Write-Ahead Log Memory Format (Intel Spec Quality)
m11: Three-Valued Logic (3VL) AND Operator Matrix

ol.li: Endianness: All WAL integers (Header & Frame) must be stored in Big-Endian.
Checksums: Implement Fletcher-64 variant as per SQLite specification.
3VL Rules: NULL AND FALSE results in FALSE. NULL AND TRUE results in NULL.
Buffer Flush: WAL frames must be synced to disk before updating the checkpoint header.
